criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence for photo and video editing tasks.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: The range and quality of editing features offered by the app.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The overall ease of use and user satisfaction with the app.

criteria.name: Performance
criteria.description: The speed and efficiency of the app in processing tasks.

criteria.name: Popularity
criteria.description: The app's user base size and market presence.
